deck: The inside story of ICDS CAS, the largest digital health project Dimagi has ever taken on, equipping more than 600,000 of India's anganwadi nutrition workers with CommCare, and what it taught the team about scaling at the national level.
seo_description: How Dimagi scaled ICDS CAS to more than 600,000 of India's anganwadi nutrition workers, and the hard lessons of reaching and sustaining national scale.
og_description: The ICDS CAS story: scaling CommCare to 600,000+ of India's anganwadi nutrition workers, and what it taught Dimagi.

pull_quote.text: You're driving a car, but you kind of reassemble it as you're driving it and turn it into a plane at the same time.
pull_quote.cite: Stella Luk, on reinventing the team to meet scale

bullets: From a Bihar pilot to a million-plus workforce: how a sub-thousand-user project in one state became a bid for national scale across India
The Mathematica RCT: the rigorous trial that isolated CommCare's effect against a fully funded control arm and gave the team conviction to go big
No more pilots: how government championship pushed Dimagi past safe, incremental steps toward ambitious scale from day one
Procurement as the real bottleneck: the years-long struggle to buy phones, SIM cards, and airtime, and why getting it right mattered more than going fast
Decoupling scale from improvement: the hard-won lesson that running what you built and continuing to improve it need separate teams and processes
Designing for a program, not just a user: keeping malnutrition outcomes at the center as the team specialized and the India office grew more local
How the role ended: COVID, annual procurement cycles, and a government decision to rebuild in-house, plus what it taught Dimagi about sustaining value at scale

stats.label: anganwadi workers using the ICDS CAS software by February 2020
increase in uptake of at least three antenatal care visits in the Bihar trial's intervention group

guests.name: Kriti Mehrotra
guests.role: Impact Advisor, based largely out of Dimagi's India office and a key player throughout the ICDS CAS scale-up.

guests.name: Shayoni Mazumdar
guests.role: Director of Strategy and Operations, who moved from running a 20-user pilot to helping support a national rollout.

guests.name: Stella Luk
guests.role: Former VP of Global Services who helped land and scale ICDS CAS, now a regional director at GiveDirectly.
